title: PREVENTION AND EDUCATION - 211info
text: ROSEBURG PREVENTION & EDUCATION PREVENTION AND EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community prevention education for substance misuse, gambling/gaming, and suicide. Also offers mentoring programs for youth with a focus on building confidence and life skills. 546 SE Jackson Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Education: Unrestricted Youth Mentoring: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 672-2691 2701 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 672-2691 Main phone Main phone (541) 672-2691 ext 2701 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties Services: Mentoring Programs * Youth Issues Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Gambling Issues Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Substance Use Disorder Issues Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Suicide Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
